title: Qrypt Brings Quantum-Secure Encryption to NVIDIA Jetson, Extending Protection From Edge AI to the Data Center
why:
- Qrypt has integrated its BLAST Protocol for quantum-secure encryption and quantum-entropy key generation with the NVIDIA Jetson edge AI platform, including Jetson Orin Nano and Jetson Thor.
- The solution eliminates the need for encryption key transmission by generating identical encryption keys independently at each endpoint using quantum entropy, so no key ever crosses a network.
- This approach enables a single quantum-secure architecture spanning from Jetson-based edge devices through NVIDIA BlueField DPUs in data centers, securing fleets of edge AI devices without requiring a rebuild of existing infrastructure.
- Qrypt’s BLAST Protocol automates key provisioning, rotation, and lifecycle management at scale, simplifying deployment across large and diverse edge environments.
- The quantum entropy used for key generation is sourced through exclusive licensing agreements with Oak Ridge and Los Alamos National Laboratories, and Qrypt’s hardware random number generators are NIST ESV certified.
